services.name: pub.hashtable:containsKey
services.description: WmPublic. Checks for the existence of a hashtable element.

input_parameters.name: hashtable
input_parameters.description: java.util.Hashtable Hashtable in which to check for the existence of a hashtable element.

input_parameters.name: key
input_parameters.description: String Hashtable element to be checked for.

output_parameters.name: containsKey
output_parameters.description: String Indicates whether the specified hashtable element exists. A value of: true indicates that the element exists. false indicates that the element does not exist.

services.name: pub.hashtable:get
services.description: WmPublic. Gets the value for a specified key in the hashtable.

input_parameters.name: hashtable
input_parameters.description: java.util.Hashtable Hashtable from which to retrieve the specified value.

input_parameters.name: key
input_parameters.description: String Key of the hashtable element whose value is to be retrieved.

output_parameters.name: value
output_parameters.description: Object Value of the input hashtable element.

services.name: pub.hashtable:listKeys
services.description: WmPublic. Lists all the keys stored in the hashtable.

input_parameters.name: hashtable
input_parameters.description: java.util.Hashtable Hashtable from which the keys are to be listed.

output_parameters.name: keys
output_parameters.description: String[] List of keys stored in the input hashtable.

services.name: pub.hashtable:put
services.description: WmPublic. Adds a key/value pair in the hashtable.

input_parameters.name: hashtable
input_parameters.description: java.util.Hashtable Hashtable to which the key/value pair is to be added.

input_parameters.name: key
input_parameters.description: String Key of the element to be added to the hashtable.

input_parameters.name: value
input_parameters.description: Object Value of the element to be inserted into the hashtable.

output_parameters.name: hashtable
output_parameters.description: java.util.Hashtable Hashtable object after the insertion of the key/value pair.

services.name: pub.hashtable:remove
services.description: WmPublic. Removes a key/value pair from the hashtable.

input_parameters.name: hashtable
input_parameters.description: java.util.Hashtable Hashtable from which to remove the key/value pair.

input_parameters.name: key
input_parameters.description: String Key of the hashtable element to be removed.

input_parameters.name: value
input_parameters.description: Object Value of the hashtable element to be removed.

output_parameters.name: hashtable
output_parameters.description: java.util.Hashtable Hashtable object after the key/value pair is removed.

output_parameters.name: value
output_parameters.description: Object Value of the hashtable element that was removed. Returns null if the input key is not found in the hashtable.

services.name: pub.hashtable:size
services.description: WmPublic. Gets the number of elements in the hashtable.

input_parameters.name: hashtable
input_parameters.description: java.util.Hashtable Hashtable from which the number of elements stored in it is to be retrieved.

output_parameters.name: size
output_parameters.description: String Number of elements in the hashtable.
